[2C[3A[?25h]0;✳ Investigate PR bugbot comments and CI failures[?25l[2D[3B[15A[38;5;246m────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────[1B[48;5;153m[38;5;16m ☐ @compiled scope [39m[49m[K[1B[K[1B[38;5;231m[1mHow far should the @compiled migration go in this work? (The toolchain already supports it; this is purely about diff [1Bscope.)[22m[39m[K[5C[1B[K[1B[38;5;153m❯[3G[38;5;246m1.[6G[38;5;153mNew + components we replace[39m[K[5C[1B[38;5;246mAuthor the new scroller + tray in @compiled, and since we're already replacing PageNavigator/SidebarPanel and [5C[1Bediting EditorLayout, those move to @compiled too. Untouched components (Canvas, properties panels, etc.) stay on [5C[1BCSS Modules for now, with a full sweep tracked as a follow-up. Natural scope, no separate giant diff.[2C[1B2.[39m New components only[K[1B     [38;5;246mOnly the brand-new scroller + tray use @compiled; leave every existing editor component (including EditorLayout) on[1B[39m     [38;5;246mCSS Modules. Smallest diff, but a longer-lived mix of both styling systems.[1B[39m  [38;5;246m3.[39m Migrate the whole editor now[K[2C[1B   [38;5;246mConvert all editor-v2[28Gcomponents[39Gfrom CSS Modules to @compiled[69Gas pa[75Gt of this PR. Clean[95Gs[97G [99Gingle-system end [39m
[6G[38;5;246mstate,[13Gbut[17Ga[19Gmuch[24Glarger[31Gdiff[36Glayered[44Gon[47Gtop[51Gof[54Gthe[58Gscroller[67G+[69Gtray[74Gwork,[80Gwith[85Gmore[90Gregression[101Grisk.[39m
[3G[38;5;246m4.[6GType[11Gsomething.[39m
[38;5;246m────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────[39m
[3G5.[6GChat[11Gabout[17Gthis

[38;5;246mEnter[7Gto[10Gselect[17G·[19G↑/↓[23Gto[26Gnavigate[35G·[37GEsc[41Gto[44Gcancel[39m

[3G[38;5;246m[1m7[22m tasks[11G([1m2[22m done,[20G[1m1[22m in[25Gprogress,[35G[1m4[22m open)[39m
